video_caption: The video begins with a high-angle view of upper kitchen cabinets and a doorway, then tilts down and pans right to reveal the sink and countertop with dishes and cleaning supplies. Around 1 second, the camera continues descending and pans left, bringing into view cooking ingredients and a black pot on the stovetop. From 2.5 to 4 seconds, the camera slides left and pans sharply left, emphasizing the microwave, kettle, and rice cooker on the left side of the counter. Between 4 and 5 seconds, the camera moves backward while continuing the leftward pan and roll, showing more of the left wall and appliances. Finally, at 5 seconds, the camera moves down again while panning left and tilting up, focusing on the stovetop and left edge of the countertop, completing a complex leftward rotation and downward displacement.
